subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and art mentioned before the Throne! Hearken unto that which the Ancient Tongue speaketh from this direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و المذکور لدی العرش ان استمع ما یتکلم به لسان القدم من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @consolation and comfort
